name: National Legal Services Authority
notes: Use the national and state legal services network to locate district legal aid bodies and institutional support.

name: National Cyber Crime Reporting Portal
notes: Useful for online fraud, harassment, non-consensual intimate image cases, and other cyber complaints.

name: Emergency Response Support System
notes: Use when there is immediate danger to life or physical safety.

name: Women's Helpline
coverage: Many states and national support channels
notes: Useful for immediate support pathways in violence, abuse, and crisis situations.

name: Women Helpline / Police Support
notes: Availability can vary by state; confirm the local response route if the number is redirected.

name: Child Helpline
notes: Use for child safety, abuse, trafficking, or abandonment concerns.

name: Cyber Financial Fraud Helpline
notes: Use quickly in suspected cyber fraud or unauthorized financial transactions.
